entries.title: honey
entries.description: Honey (I Shrunk the AI) — three reflexive levers that cut agent token cost: less code (YAGNI/stdlib-first), less prose, and denser agent-to-agent handoffs (ESON/compact-JSON). Plus on-demand satellites (review, eco, gain, compress) and a hive of read-only subagents that return compressed handoffs. Auto-intensity lite/full/ultra; correctness and safety-critical paths stay exact.

entries.title: claude-chillbro
entries.description: Auto-approves obviously-safe Bash commands so Claude Code stops asking permission for every grep, cat, and ls. Static allowlist (read-only ops), static asklist (destructive ops), self-learning (commands you've approved twice get auto-approved next time), and a headless 'claude -p' classifier as a last-resort fallback for unknown commands.

entries.title: crypto-trading-desk
entries.description: Multi-agent cryptocurrency intelligence system with 7 specialized AI agents, 65 MCP tools, cognitive learning, and self-evolving capabilities for comprehensive market analysis and paper trading.

entries.title: ak
entries.description: AlgoKiller — ARM64 trace evidence analysis & cipher algorithm recovery. Bundles the AlgoKiller methodology as skills + a local MCP server (28 tools) that drives the native ak_search engine over GB-scale trace files. v1.2.0 adds two trace tools targeted at OLLVM-flattened binaries — `trace_function` (PC-level invocation analyzer with depth-counter ret boundary, replaces manual trace_search + trace_context loop for stripped helpers) and `trace_immseq` (anchor-driven prev_reg sequence extraction, recovers table-consumption order from jump-table-dispatcher functions). Formalizes R9 (`regN=X -> regN=Y` prev/new semantics — single most common LLM misread in obfuscated code) and FIX #8 (algorithm-name claims require trace_cryptoinstr/trace_constscan/trace_immseq/trace_function fingerprint corroboration before conclude(>=medium)). Loosens five over-strict gates: trace_search limit 100→500, B2 same-args rule exempts hint-driven fallback paths, cross-session [H<n>] references become non-blocking warnings instead of hard errors. Tests 128 → 149 PASS.

entries.title: glassbox-harness
entries.description: Harness tooling for building Glassbox under its own observation: guardrail hooks (no-network, no-raw-transcript, verify-on-stop, tool-use log, session-start), the schema-investigator / slice-implementer / metric-author agents, repo skills, and dev-time-only MCP servers. Enforces the no-network, zero-dependency, single-boundary rules (OBJ-5).

entries.title: clawness
entries.description: A Claude Code plugin that puts the right coding rules in context on every prompt, automatically. 120 rules across 18 domains, per-prompt rule injection (BM25 + TF-IDF + RRF + concept expansion, pure Python), a per-codebase lessons-learned memory injected every turn, Bash-output compression, adversarial review sub-agents, slash commands, a default-on (opt-out) plan-approval gate, and session security hardening (an access guard that forces a prompt on likely exfiltration/destructive tool calls, and a trust ledger that flags changed skills/agents). No Docker, no services, no ML models. Requires Python 3.10+ on PATH; on first session a background hook installs PyYAML (the only dependency) into your environment.

entries.description: Obsidian-backed persistent memory for Claude Code. SessionStart loads vault context; UserPromptSubmit retrieves relevant notes per turn via a description-anchored gate; SessionEnd journals + writes proactive notes with auto-commit.

entries.title: growth-engine
entries.description: A personal growth strategist for builders and creators: opportunity radar, niche research wikis, brand positioning, accountability reviews, and a self-improving playbook — all with persistent memory across sessions.

entries.title: vern
entries.description: Chaotic multi-persona AI discovery system. 16 unique Vern personas, VernHole council tiers, Oracle vision, and a full multi-LLM discovery pipeline.

entries.title: agent-webbridge
entries.description: Clean-room, open-source (MIT) browser automation for AI agents. Drives the user's real Chrome with its live login sessions across multiple Chrome profiles in parallel — and, unlike typical browser bridges that share one global current tab, attaches chrome.debugger per tab so N tabs in one profile run concurrently. No closed-source dependency, no account, no telemetry.

entries.title: bluff
entries.description: call its bluff. — extract the URLs and citations from an answer and check they actually resolve, catching hallucinated links. Ships a skill and a `bluff` CLI.

entries.title: compass
entries.description: Compass — an adaptive spec-driven development framework. The Needle reads four context dimensions and a deterministic CLI computes the route; BDD/TDD strategies and five hard guardrails keep the work honest. Ships the /compass: pipeline commands, agents, skills, hooks, and the compass CLI.

entries.title: fold
entries.description: know when to fold. — catch overconfident phrasing (absolutes, bare certainty, false authority) in a draft answer and prefer calibrated uncertainty or honest abstention. Ships a skill and a `fold` CLI.

entries.title: which-claude-code
entries.description: Auto-generated session titles + per-session colors in the statusline, so parallel Claude Code sessions are easy to tell apart at a glance.

entries.title: steno
entries.description: two letters, and the prompt writes itself. — short aliases that expand into full prompts for common dev tasks; optionally runs them. Ships a skill and a `steno` CLI.

entries.title: codex-reviewer
entries.description: Run Codex GPT-5.5 as an independent code reviewer from Claude Code.

entries.title: afc
entries.description: Automated pipeline for Claude Code. Automates the full development cycle: spec → plan → implement → review → clean.

entries.title: tollbooth
entries.description: know the bill before the bill. — estimate token count and dollar cost of a prompt across models before you send it. Ships a skill and a `tollbooth` CLI.

entries.title: alibi
entries.description: does the story check out? — verify an answer's claims are grounded in the provided sources and flag fabricated or unsupported statements (lexical, deterministic, no model calls). Ships a skill and an `alibi` CLI.

entries.title: frisk
entries.description: pat it down before it ships. — scan text headed to the model for secrets and PII (API keys, tokens, private keys, emails) and redact or flag them. Ships a skill and a `frisk` CLI.

entries.title: critic
entries.description: Multi-agent fiction review system. Runs structured critique with independent reviewers, cross-review, and synthesis.

entries.title: axr
entries.description: Agent eXecution Readiness scoring. Grades a repository against a 100-point rubric across 9 dimensions with deterministic bash checkers and judgment subagents.

entries.title: grill
entries.description: put it in the hot seat. — adversarially interrogate an answer across assumptions, edge-cases, contradictions, sources, overconfidence, and falsifiability, then report where it holds and where it cracks. Ships a skill and a `grill` CLI.

entries.title: antigravity-obsidian
entries.description: Antigravity-CLI fork of claude-obsidian (AgriciDaniel, MIT) — adds Antigravity CLI (agy) support alongside Claude Code; the underlying LLM-Wiki system is AgriciDaniel's work. Claude + Obsidian knowledge companion. Sets up a persistent, compounding wiki vault (Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern). v1.7 "Compound Vault" + v1.8 methodology modes. Ships: substrate alignment with kepano/obsidian-skills, default Obsidian CLI transport, hybrid retrieval (contextual prefix + BM25 + cosine rerank per Anthropic's Sept 2024 research), per-file advisory locking for multi-writer safety, pre-commit verifier agent, AND methodology modes (LYT / PARA / Zettelkasten / Generic). Optional DragonScale Memory extension (log folds, deterministic addresses, semantic tiling lint, boundary-first autoresearch).

entries.title: tldraw-buddy
entries.description: Collaborative tldraw canvas for Claude Code — draw diagrams, flowcharts, and sketches together

entries.title: clair
entries.description: Pair with a teammate through your AI harness, over git, ephemeral, no server. Keeps two Claudes quietly aware of each other's prompts and conclusions on the same branch. Bundles the UserPromptSubmit + Stop capture/inject hooks and the /clair slash commands.

entries.title: jclipa-toolkit
entries.description: Project-agnostic, layered skills for Claude Code. Skills define behavior; per-org/repo configuration resolves at runtime via search path.

entries.title: puredata
entries.description: Build and drive Pure Data patches from natural language. Bundles a Pd MCP server (FUDI over TCP, native dynamic patching) and a skill that orients Claude on synthesis, audio routing, and py4pd Python objects.

entries.title: school-skills
entries.description: Classroom-ready skills for Claude Code — lesson plans, Socratic tutoring, circle time, rubrics, arts & crafts, study guides, and concept maps.

entries.title: pos
entries.description: Generador y sistema operativo determinista para proyectos Claude Code: cuestionario → profile → repo generado con hooks, skills, policy, tests, CI/CD.

entries.title: mugshot
entries.description: we know your prints. — guess which model or family likely wrote a passage from its stylistic fingerprints (gpt-ish, claude-ish, generic-AI) and show the matched tells. A heuristic, not proof. Ships a skill and a `mugshot` CLI.

entries.title: salvage
entries.description: rip the JSON out of the chatter. — extract and repair valid JSON buried in chatty LLM output. Ships a skill and a `salvage` CLI filter.

entries.title: jar-analyzer-plugin
entries.description: jar-analyzer project for java vulnerability analysis

entries.title: lineup
entries.description: same prompt, the whole lineup. — run one prompt across several models and compare the answers side by side for model selection and spotting disagreement. Ships a skill and a `lineup` CLI.

entries.title: hologit
entries.description: Skills for configuring and using hologit

entries.title: unifable
entries.description: A harness that makes Opus (or any Claude/Codex model) behave like Fable: completion, evidence, and verification enforced as procedure, auto-routed per task. Native plugin on Claude Code and Codex (hooks self-contained). Fork of fivetaku/fablize.

entries.title: mole
entries.description: find the plant. — sniff out planted instructions hiding in untrusted text (a pasted page, a tool result, retrieved RAG context) before it reaches the model — instruction overrides, role spoofing, jailbreaks, prompt-leaks — and tag or refuse them. Ships a skill and a `mole` CLI.

entries.title: xlai
entries.description: Interactive Excel exploration and modification with Claude

entries.title: snitch
entries.description: see what your agent actually said behind your back. — a transparent proxy + web UI that logs the exact bytes your agent sends the model. Ships a skill and a `snitch` CLI.

entries.title: ccthread
entries.description: Read, search, and summarize Claude Code conversation logs from ~/.claude/projects.

entries.title: interrobang
entries.description: make it ask before it acts. — flip the helpful-assistant reflex: ask one sharp clarifying question instead of guessing. Ships a skill and an `interrobang` CLI.

entries.title: antigravity-obsidian
entries.description: Antigravity-CLI fork of claude-obsidian (AgriciDaniel, MIT) — adds Antigravity CLI (agy) support alongside Claude Code; the underlying LLM-Wiki system is AgriciDaniel's work. Claude + Obsidian knowledge companion. Sets up a persistent, compounding wiki vault (Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern). v1.7 "Compound Vault" + v1.8 methodology modes. Ships: substrate alignment with kepano/obsidian-skills, default Obsidian CLI transport, hybrid retrieval (contextual prefix + BM25 + cosine rerank per Anthropic's Sept 2024 research), per-file advisory locking for multi-writer safety, pre-commit verifier agent, AND methodology modes (LYT / PARA / Zettelkasten / Generic). Optional DragonScale Memory extension (log folds, deterministic addresses, semantic tiling lint, boundary-first autoresearch).

entries.title: goodvibesonly
entries.description: Security scanner for vibe-coded projects. Automatically scans for hardcoded secrets, SQL injection, XSS, and other vulnerabilities before commits.

entries.title: aigg-memory
entries.description: Cross-session memory for Claude Code: recall what past conversations learned about you, and consolidate new facts at session end. File-backed markdown, git-versioned, local-first.

entries.title: claude-ss
entries.description: Frictionless screenshot workflow for Claude Code on macOS. Press cmd+shift+2, drag, switch to your terminal — screenshots paste in order. Multi-shot, tmux/iTerm2 aware, IME-safe.

entries.title: jieli
entries.description: Sync Claude Code sessions to Jieli threads and attach Jieli thread trailers to Claude-created commits.

entries.title: kb-plugin
entries.description: A general purpose knowledge base managed by a specialized intelligent agent.

entries.title: claude-spectator
entries.description: OS-level read-only sandbox for safe command execution

entries.title: buildable
entries.description: Local product-structure compiler, compact UI/UX brain, and quality gate for your coding agent: a prompt becomes the right archetype, selected design system, runnable build-verified starter, and reviewed result.

entries.title: axon
entries.description: Spider-powered self-hosted RAG engine — scrape, map, extract, crawl, embed, and query via MCP or CLI. 16 skills covering web crawling, GitHub/Reddit/YouTube ingest, semantic vector search, and grounded LLM answers over indexed content.

entries.title: apprise
entries.description: Send push notifications via apprise-mcp — a Rust MCP bridge to the Apprise universal notification library (Slack, Discord, email, Telegram, and 100+ services).

entries.title: homelab-core
entries.description: Core homelab agents, commands, and setup/health skills for self-hosted service management. Includes interactive credential setup wizard and unified service health dashboard.

entries.title: rarcane
entries.description: Rust MCP server for Arcane Docker management — manage containers, images, networks, volumes, compose projects, GitOps, and vulnerability scanning across Docker environments.

entries.title: unifi
entries.description: UniFi network management via MCP — monitor devices, clients, health, alarms, events, and WLANs through the rustifi MCP server.

entries.title: swag-mcp
entries.description: SWAG reverse proxy configuration management via MCP. Create, edit, view, and manage nginx proxy configurations with auth integration.

entries.title: gotify
entries.description: Gotify push notification server via MCP

entries.title: tailscale
entries.description: Tailscale network management via MCP — query devices, ACL, DNS, users, and API keys from Claude

entries.title: unraid-mcp
entries.description: Query, monitor, and manage Unraid servers via GraphQL API through MCP tools. Supports system info, Docker, VMs, array/parity, notifications, plugins, rclone, and live telemetry.

entries.title: unraid
entries.description: Unraid NAS/homelab monitoring via MCP

entries.title: context-king
entries.description: Semantic code navigation (ck): find-files, signatures, symbol/refs, method-source, and indexing for large codebases.

entries.title: superpowers-zh
entries.description: AI 编程超能力中文增强版：20 个 skills（14 翻译 + 4 中国原创 + 2 上游历史保留），支持 Claude Code / Hermes Agent / Cursor / Claw Code / Qoder 等 18 款工具

entries.title: ralph-skills
entries.description: Skills for the Ralph autonomous agent system - Generate PRDs and convert them to prd.json format for autonomous execution

entries.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entries.description: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,644 supported skills.
